title: What this enables
summary: Deck authors get one local loop for live structured editing, candidate review, validation, export, and archived output.

bullets.title: Author with context
bullets.body: Keep objective, constraints, slide intent, and current content together.

bullets.title: Compare before apply
bullets.body: Generate variants, inspect differences, and promote only the chosen version.

bullets.title: Ship with guardrails
bullets.body: Validate layout, media behavior, Studio chrome, and render drift before archiving.

resources.title: Runtime path
resources.body: slide JSON, DOM renderer, PDF export, archive
